# synthetics_totp_variable_v2_check (Data Source)

Reads Synthetics TOTP variable metadata. The TOTP secret is not returned by the API and is not exposed by this data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "synthetics_totp_variable_v2_check" "login_mfa" {
  totp_variable {
    id = 123
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `totp_variable` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--totp_variable))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--totp_variable"></a>
### Nested Schema for `totp_variable`

Required:

- `id` (Number)

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `created_by` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `digits` (Number)
- `hmac_digest` (String)
- `interval` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `updated_by` (String)
